name_en: M24575 Blue, M24120 Pink, M24563 Yellow, Original Leather, Dynamic Code Change. This Capucines Mini Bag features Taurillon leather and lustrous metal hardware, with a petite Capucines Cutie decoration crafted from the same materials and design, secured to the strap with a Monogram flower hook. A playful design that effortlessly brightens any look. 21.0 x 14.0 x 8.0 cm (L x H x W)
name_cn:
M24575 Blue, M24120 Pink, M24563 Yellow, Original Leather, Dynamic Code Change. This Capucines Mini Bag features Taurillon leather and lustrous metal hardware, with a petite Capucines Cutie decoration crafted from the same materials and design, secured to the strap with a Monogram flower hook. A playful design that effortlessly brightens any look. 21.0 x 14.0 x 8.0 cm (L x H x W)
26.5 x 17.5 x 9.0 cm (L x H x W)
	•	Taurillon leather
	•	Taurillon leather trim
	•	Calfskin lining
	•	Lustrous metal hardware
	•	Capucines Cutie decoration
	•	Internal patch pocket
	•	Metal studs
	•	Strap: Removable, non-adjustable
	•	Strap drop: 51.0 cm
	•	Handle: Single handle
